description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages init, check, build, deploy and a cache keyed by ${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} storing node_modules/ and dist/. Add an init job in the init stage that runs cnpm install. Add a dev_check job in the check stage that runs only on the dev branch, executing echo "Start Check Eros Config ..." and bash check.sh debug. Add a master_check job in the check stage that runs only on the master branch, executing echo "Start Check Eros Config ..." and bash check.sh release. Add a js_build job in the build stage that runs eros build. Add a dev_deploy job in the deploy stage that runs only on dev, executing bash deploy.sh debug, and a master_deploy job in the deploy stage that runs only on master, executing bash deploy.sh release.
